Pinpoint where and why you're losing customers so you can increase conversion rates with funnels. Funnels tracks unique users across any multi-step journey that you define. Each step in the funnel is an event that acts like a checkpoint a user must pass through in order to be counted, and steps within the funnel can be more narrowly defined by any event or people property. You can easily reorder the steps, add another step, or modify the time to complete window. This defines how long a user has to get from the first step to the last. In addition to the overall conversion rate, click the eye to view the historical conversion rate between steps in daily, weekly, or monthly increments. Then, filter the funnel by any event or people property to see the unique conversion rate for each value. And, if you select a value, you can filter even further. Funnels is one more way Mixpanel helps you learn from your data.
